positive: Minimalist, high-contrast silhouette design of a stylized mountain range under a vast, geometric sun. The mountains should be depicted with sharp, clean peaks and a bold, graphic composition. Use negative space heavily, featuring clean lines and simplified shapes. Color palette should be limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, and crisp white. Emphasize a symmetry-aware central composition, perfect for a t-shirt print. Vector art style, screen-print aesthetic, graphic novel influence, ultra-detailed ink work, crisp edges, studio lighting, clean background.
negative: text, logos, blurry, out of focus, watermark, signature, low detail, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, gradients, photography, realism, cluttered, photorealistic
